description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire. He wears a loose bomber jacket over a buttoned shirt, with a plaid shirt tied around his waist, and fitted pants. His footwear consists of athletic sneakers, and he has a clean-shaven face with glasses. His hair is short and neatly styled, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. The overall appearance suggests a modern, youthful city dweller ready for a walk or casual outing.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a bomber jacket, plaid shirt tied at the waist, fitted pants, and sneakers, wearing glasses and sporting short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, glasses, bomber jacket, buttoned shirt, plaid shirt tied at the waist, fitted pants, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the layered clothing, and the sneakers' side details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the bomber jacket, the plaid shirt tied at the waist, and the back of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with clear visibility of the hand and sneaker details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual bomber jacket over a buttoned shirt, fitted pants, and a plaid shirt tied at the waist
